title: gamocarpha macrocephala
intro: Gamocarpha macrocephala is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Gamocarpha macrocephala include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and antipyretic properties. Gamocarpha macrocephala is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
